title: OmniBind
description: Add configurable keybinds and quick keyboard controls for vanilla settings and sliders with optional HUD/toast notifications.
body:
# OmniBind

OmniBind provides quick keyboard control and keybinds for vanilla settings. Use keyboard shortcuts to toggle options or adjust sliders without opening menus. Visual feedback is available via toast or HUD notifications.

## Features
- Keybinds for toggles and sliders
- Increment / decrement controls with configurable step size
- Toast and HUD notifications on change
- Discovers vanilla sound source sliders and groups them with other sound options
- Uses vanilla translation keys; includes English locale

## Configuration
- Open the OmniBind configuration screen with the configured keybind (default: configurable).
- Assign keybinds per-setting, enable/disable notifications, and tune step sizes.

## Support
Report bugs or request features on GitHub: https://github.com/Hexeption/omnibind/issues
